steps.describeReview: Generate the PR description and review findings
steps.judge: Decide whether there are important issues needing follow-up
steps.parseFail: Could not parse a recommendation — routing to manual review
steps.summary: Synthesize the description and findings into a review summary

drafts.notFound: Draft not found (it may have been deleted)

proxy.authFailed: Proxy authentication failed (407); check the username/password
proxy.disabled: Proxy is disabled or its address is empty

update.parseCurrentFailed: Unable to parse the current version: {{version}}
update.parseLatestFailed: Unable to parse the latest version: {{tag}}
